Templates › NZ Job Quote Template

📋 NZ Job Quote Template

Professional job quote template for NZ tradies — GST compliant, ready to customise and download as PDF.

How to use: Fill in your business details and job scope, then click Download PDF. All fields are editable — click any text to change it.

Click to upload logo
JOB QUOTE
Quote #: QT-001
Date: 2026-01-01
Valid until: 30 days from above
From (Your Business)
Your Business Name
123 Trade Street, Auckland
021 000 0000
GST No: 123-456-789
Prepared For
Client Name
Client Address
Client Phone / Email
Job Description
Supply and install [description of work]. All materials and labour included as per scope below.
Job Address
123 Job Site Road, Suburb, City
DescriptionQtyUnitRate ($)Total ($)
Labour — [trade type]8hrs95.00760.00
Materials — [describe]1lot450.00450.00
Call-out / Travel1—75.0075.00
Subtotal$1,285.00
GST (15%)$192.75
TOTAL$1,477.75
Payment Terms
50% deposit on acceptance. Balance due on completion. Bank: [Your Bank], Account: [XX-XXXX-XXXXXXX-XX]
Notes / Exclusions
This quote excludes: consent fees, asbestos removal, any work not described above. Variations will be quoted separately.
Authorised by (Tradie)
Accepted by (Customer) / Date
NZ Tradie Tools — tradietools.nz | This quote is valid for 30 days. GST registered under the Goods and Services Tax Act 1985.

📋 NZ Job Quote Template

No sign-up required. Free forever.

How to use this template

  • Click any field to edit it
  • Fill in your business details first
  • Click "Download PDF" to save
  • Or click "Print" for a paper copy

Fill in your business details and job scope, then click Download PDF.
